generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor measuring internal environment of thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from physical sensors in thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4, ScipyOptimization
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model using Computer-Aided Design (CAD) for structural dimensions of thermal incubator"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHubRepository
]

instance ThermalDynamicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model described by differential equations for thermal dynamics of incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimization
]

instance CyberModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Cyber model representing computational aspects of the Digital Twin system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B physical controller for managing thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThermalSimulationService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message-oriented middleware for inter-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ScipyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for optimization algorithms in Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub repositories for version control of hardware and software code"
    DTDFVocab:enables VersionControlService
]

instance ThermalSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates thermal behavior of physical incubator for predictive analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalSimulationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors system performance for safety and optimal operation using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationAlert, OptimalPerformanceAlert
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes heating elements through fault detection and control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectorInsight, SupervisoryControllerAction, StateEstimatorInsight, OptimizerInsight
]

instance VersionControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages version control of hardware specifications and software code for Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelVersioningInsight, CodeVersioningInsight
]

instance ThermalSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive thermal behavior simulation results for incubator under current conditions"
]

instance SafetyViolationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating safety violation in thermal incubator operation"
]

instance OptimalPerformanceAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating suboptimal performance requiring adjustment"
]

instance FaultDetectorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in thermal system components based on sensor data and model analysis"
]

instance SupervisoryControllerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control actions to maintain optimal system parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StateEstimatorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the thermal system using sensor data and models"
]

instance OptimizerInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized settings for heating elements to achieve desired temperature profiles"
]

instance ModelVersioningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking of model versions and updates in GitHub repositories"
]

instance CodeVersioningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking of software code versions in GitHub repositories"
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam box component of thermal incubator system for insulation"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heating component of thermal incubator system"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cooling fan component for thermal regulation in incubator"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The controller on the Raspberry Pi listens to the RabbitMQ server for commands controlling the fan and heatbed; the low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to validate command integrity before execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs calibration algorithms to update models of the cyber-physical system and environment with the best estimate of parameters, uses the resulting data to inform monitors checking for safe and optimal performance, and triggers human or algorithmic interventions upon detecting violations to adjust the physical twin."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs a RabbitMQ server running on the Raspberry Pi for message brokering, with sensors connected via a 1-Wire bus supporting multiple DS18S20 devices."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Monitors within the Digital Twin check for safe and optimal system performance; upon violation detection, humans or algorithms initiate changes to the Physical Twin."
]
